02 // Expertise

Skills & Services

Comprehensive digital marketing to grow your reach, community, and impact.

01

SEO Optimization

Help seekers find you first. Higher rankings, more organic traffic, more people walking through your door.

02

Social Media Management

A consistent presence across platforms that turns followers into a genuine, engaged community.

03

Content Marketing

Valuable content that attracts, encourages, and converts the exact audience you're called to reach.

04

Email Marketing Campaigns

Campaigns your congregation and donors actually open, read, and act on — every time.

05

Paid Advertising (PPC)

Every dollar accountable. Targeted campaigns designed to maximize return on your budget.

06

Analytics & Reporting

Clear insight into what's working, so every decision is guided by data — not guesswork.

03 // Impact

Proven Results

Data doesn't lie. Here's the quantifiable impact of strategic marketing.

0

Views Generated

Total across all campaigns — social, blog, and video content that expands visibility dramatically.

0

Engagement Rate

Several times the 1–2% industry average. Proof the message connects with the people who matter.

0

Followers Grown

A genuine community built across platforms — people who show up, share, and stay for the long term.

0

Return on Ad Spend

Every $1 invested returned $3.50 in value. Efficient, accountable, results-driven advertising.

06 // About

Meet the person
behind the mission

Hey, I'm Jason. I help churches, ministries, and non-profits reach the people they're called to serve — using the same strategies top brands pay agencies six figures for.

Organizations doing the most meaningful work deserve the best marketing, not the leftovers. Real strategy, honest reporting, campaigns built around your values — never at their expense.

✓Mission-first strategy
✓Transparent reporting
✓Values-aligned campaigns
✓Long-term partnership
